title: 9-Year-Old Indian Girl Wins Prestigious Global Acclaim For Capturing Peafowl Moment in Rajasthan
description: Shreyovi Mehta’s award-winning photograph, titled In the Spotlight, captures a serene and striking moment featuring two Indian peafowl (peahens) silhouetted under a canopy of trees in Rajasthan’s Keoladeo National Park. The photo was taken by her during a casual morning walk with her parents.
